name_cn:
22YSL Autumn/Winter Patent Leather
SAINT LAURENT PARIS Mini Shopping Bag
Mini shopping bag with a snap closure, featuring a detachable leather cover with the classic YSL logo charm! Made of black patent calfskin, durable with a great texture!
Style: 773995560
Size: 18 X 17 X 8
